productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Casual Maroon Sandals
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of this truely Italian franco leone leather sandals. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair and leave behind your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide midfoot and backfoot leather strap to lock the foot in place in absolute comfortVelcro closure at the backfoot strap to offer a customised FitPadded fabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfortBrand badge on the lateral midfoot strapErgonomically curved footbed for absolute all-day comfortOutsoleTPU outsole with whirlpool textured lugs and grooves ergonomically placed for absolute grip and traction on various surfacesshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
